name: butane_conformational_analysis
prompt: Run the conformational-analysis task on butane using the PM7 (mopac) method in the gas phase. Pass only --method mopac and the .xyz file — the task auto-detects all rotatable bonds by default, so do NOT add any extra flag for that (there is no --auto/--rotors flag). Report the rotation barrier(s) found (per scanned dihedral), state the method used, and surface any warnings the calculation produced about PM7 parameter coverage. Use the chemkit tools; do not guess the number. Use charge 0 and multiplicity 1.
